hypothesis: Integrating a learned synthesizability predictor into MatAgent’s iterative feedback loop to perform joint optimization of formation energy per atom and synthesizability will yield candidate compositions whose predicted formation energies stay within ±0.25 eV/atom of targets while increasing the fraction of candidates with synthesizability score ≥0.7 by at least 30% relative to MatAgent optimizing formation energy alone, without decreasing the V.U.N. score by more than 10%.
